based_on: Byte-precise mutation of fixtures/xor-per-neuron-bias.golden.jsonl (engine-emitted v0.4 canonical bytes, per-neuron biases on h1/h2/y with bias_policy.mode=sgd). The fixture differs from the golden in exactly two places: the fixture_status block (3 fields) and the single targeted numeric value.

mutation.delta_vs_tolerance_multiplier: ~970x (effective tolerance ~1.03e-9 at this magnitude under {atol: 1e-12, rtol: 1e-8})
what_was_NOT_mutated: parameters_before.b_h1 (0.100000000 — left operand of Rule 7 sum)
updates[6].update (0.00309395108 — right operand of Rule 7 sum)
updates[6].weight_after (0.103093951 — Rule 6 still passes; it does not read parameters_after)
all other parameters_after entries (only b_h1 mutated)

single_target_invariant: Reconciliation produces exactly one Rule 7 failure naming parameters_after.b_h1 on parameter b_h1. Rule 6 must NOT fire (updates[6].weight_after is internally consistent with weight_before + update). No other rule fires.
reconciliation_check_targeted_first: Rule 7: parameters_after[param] == parameters_before[param] + sum(updates targeting param)
failure_priority_assertion: Per docs/reconciliation.md, reconciliation failures report before fixture-lifecycle failures. The fixture_status block being deliberately_corrupted / expected_to_fail_reconciliation must NOT mask the Rule 7 failure.
purpose: Anti-circularity (Csmith / CompCert lineage) extended into the v0.4 per-neuron bias corner: proves the reconciler checks Rule 7 (final state == parameters_before + sum(updates)) on per-neuron bias parameters by detecting a 1e-6 mismatch (970x the rtol-scaled tolerance) between stored parameters_after.b_h1 and the sum of (unmutated) parameters_before.b_h1 + updates[6].update.
v0_4_note: Per-neuron bias updates surface in updates[] alongside weight updates, so Rule 7's 'updated parameter' branch (parameter found in updatesById) handles them identically. The 'bias-policy.mode === constant' branch of Rule 7 — exact zero-delta — is exercised by per_layer fixtures and by mode=constant fixtures, not by this one (this receipt has mode=sgd).
